option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" />
<application android:name=".GameTrackerApp" android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:label="@string/app_name" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" />
<application android:name=".GameTrackerApp" android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:label="@string/app_name" android:configChanges="orientation|screenSize|keyboardHidden|screenLayout|smallestScreenSize" android:theme="@style/Theme.DesaAppsAvalosKoOrtuzarVargas"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

updatedContent

updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">ArgenGamer</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Explorar</string> <string name="nav_news">Noticias</string> <string name="nav_settings">Ajustes</string> <string name="nav_favorites">Favoritos</string>
<string name="action_search">Buscar</string> <string name="action_save">Guardar</string> <string name="action_edit">Editar</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="action_remove">Quitar</string> <string name="label_back">Volver</string>
<string name="label_all">Todos</string> <string name="label_favorites">Favoritos</string> <string name="label_profile">Perfil</string> <string name="label_username">Nombre de usuario</string> <string name="label_email">Correo</string> <string name="label_not_set">Sin definir</string> <string name="label_region">Región</string> <string name="label_country_affects_prices">País (afecta precios)</string> <string name="label_language">Idioma</string> <string name="language_english">Inglés - EN</string> <string name="language_spanish">Español - ES</string> <string name="label_notifications">Notificaciones</string> <string name="label_enable_notifications">Activar notificaciones</string> <string name="label_alerts_unread">Alertas (%1$d sin leer)</string> <string name="label_favorites_count">Favoritos (%1$d)</string> <string name="label_no_favorites">Sin favoritos. Agregá juegos del catálogo.</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Preferencias de notificación</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notificaciones: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="label_news">Noticias</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Buscar juegos o etiquetas…</string> <string name="games_no_results">No se encontraron juegos</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">Todas las categorías</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Actualizaciones</string> <string name="news_category_events">Eventos</string> <string name="news_no_results">No se encontraron noticias</string> <string name="news_category_format">Categoría: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favoritos</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Mín. histórico</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Gratis</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Gratis temporal</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">Todo gratis</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">Ninguno de los juegos de tu catálogo tiene descuentos activos en este momento. ¡Volvé más tarde!</string>
<string name="offers_tab_price_drops">Bajó el precio</string> <string name="offers_no_price_drops">No se detectaron bajas permanentes de precio todavía. Rastreamos los cambios de precio base con el tiempo.</string> <string name="badge_price_drop"> Bajó el precio</string> <string name="price_new_base">Nuevo precio: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="offer_ended">Oferta finalizada</string> <string name="offer_countdown_hours">%1$dh %2$dm restantes</string> <string name="offer_countdown_date">Hasta el %1$s</string> <string name="offer_on_sale">En oferta</string>
<string name="game_available_on_header">Disponible en</string> <string name="game_release_date">Fecha de lanzamiento</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Calificación Metacritic</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string> <string name="game_rating_source">Metacritic</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Descuento histórico</string> <string name="game_description">Descripción</string> <string name="game_prices">Precios</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Tiendas disponibles en tu región</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% de descuento</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/D</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">Sin datos en vivo - mostrando precios guardados</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs y expansiones (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Desc. histórico: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Calificación</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorito</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Descuento histórico: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) disponibles</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_available_on"> Disponible en %1$s</string> <string name="game_free_to_play_label">Free to Play</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">¡GRATIS!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Gratis para jugar</string> <string name="price_was">Antes: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">¡GRATIS AHORA!</string> <string name="price_until">Hasta: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">¡Mínimo histórico!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Alerta de descuento</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s está en su menor precio: -%2$d%% en %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s tiene %2$d%% de descuento en %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">Para aplicar los cambios es necesario reiniciar la app. ¿Confirma que quiere reiniciar?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Aplicar cambios</string> <string name="action_no_apply">No aplicar</string>
<string name="offline_banner">Estás sin conexión. Los precios pueden estar desactualizados.</string> <string name="prices_from_cache">⚠ Precios cargados desde caché (pueden estar desactualizados)</string> <string name="label_coming_soon">próximamente</string> <string name="dolar_tarjeta_rate"> Precio estimado con tarjeta argentina (cotización: $%1$s)</string> <string name="ars_price_disclaimer">Incluye IVA y percepciones. El precio final puede variar según tu tarjeta.</string> <string name="favorites_empty">No tenés favoritos aún. ¡Explorá juegos y agregalos a tu lista!</string> <string name="favorites_header">Tus Juegos</string>
<!-- Precios regionales --> <string name="prices_argentina_header">Precios en Argentina</string> <string name="prices_argentina_subtitle">Precios reales obtenidos de cada tienda para Argentina</string> <string name="steam_ar_regional_label">Precio regional (fijado por el publisher para Argentina)</string> <string name="steam_ar_tax_note"> Este es el precio base. Con impuestos de tarjeta (IVA + Ganancias) el costo final puede ser mayor.</string> <string name="steam_us_reference_label">Precio en EE.UU. (solo de referencia)</string> <string name="international_prices_header">Otras tiendas (precios internacionales)</string> <string name="international_prices_disclaimer">Estos son precios de EE.UU./globales en USD. El precio real en tu región puede ser diferente.</string>
<!-- Toggle de moneda y precios de referencia --> <string name="currency_display_label">Moneda de visualización</string> <string name="game_prices_header">Precios</string> <string name="game_prices_subtitle">Precios en vivo de tiendas y referencia del catálogo</string> <string name="game_reference_prices">Precios en otras tiendas</string> <string name="game_reference_prices_note">Precios de referencia del catálogo (USD). Los precios reales pueden variar.</string> <string name="game_price_ars_approx">≈ %1$s</string> <string name="price_regional_label">Precio regional (Argentina)</string> <string name="price_currency_label">Precio en %1$s</string> <string name="price_ref_label">(ref.)</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">ArgenGamer</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Explorar</string> <string name="nav_news">Noticias</string> <string name="nav_settings">Ajustes</string> <string name="nav_favorites">Favoritos</string>
<string name="action_search">Buscar</string> <string name="action_save">Guardar</string> <string name="action_edit">Editar</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="action_remove">Quitar</string> <string name="label_back">Volver</string>
<string name="label_all">Todos</string> <string name="label_favorites">Favoritos</string> <string name="label_profile">Perfil</string> <string name="label_username">Nombre de usuario</string> <string name="label_email">Correo</string> <string name="label_not_set">Sin definir</string> <string name="label_region">Región</string> <string name="label_country_affects_prices">País (afecta precios)</string> <string name="label_language">Idioma</string> <string name="language_english">Inglés - EN</string> <string name="language_spanish">Español - ES</string> <string name="label_notifications">Notificaciones</string> <string name="label_enable_notifications">Activar notificaciones</string> <string name="label_alerts_unread">Alertas (%1$d sin leer)</string> <string name="label_favorites_count">Favoritos (%1$d)</string> <string name="label_no_favorites">Sin favoritos. Agregá juegos del catálogo.</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Preferencias de notificación</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notificaciones: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Ofertas</string> <string name="label_news">Noticias</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Buscar juegos o etiquetas…</string> <string name="games_no_results">No se encontraron juegos</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">Todas las categorías</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Actualizaciones</string> <string name="news_category_events">Eventos</string> <string name="news_no_results">No se encontraron noticias</string> <string name="news_category_format">Categoría: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Descuentos</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favoritos</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Mín. histórico</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Gratis</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Gratis temporal</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">Todo gratis</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">Ninguno de los juegos de tu catálogo tiene descuentos activos en este momento. ¡Volvé más tarde!</string>
<string name="offers_tab_price_drops">Bajó el precio</string> <string name="offers_no_price_drops">No se detectaron bajas permanentes de precio todavía. Rastreamos los cambios de precio base con el tiempo.</string> <string name="badge_price_drop"> Bajó el precio</string> <string name="price_new_base">Nuevo precio: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="offer_ended">Oferta finalizada</string> <string name="offer_countdown_hours">%1$dh %2$dm restantes</string> <string name="offer_countdown_date">Hasta el %1$s</string> <string name="offer_on_sale">En oferta</string>
<string name="game_available_on_header">Disponible en</string> <string name="game_release_date">Fecha de lanzamiento</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Calificación Metacritic</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string> <string name="game_rating_source">Metacritic</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Descuento histórico</string> <string name="game_description">Descripción</string> <string name="game_prices">Precios</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Tiendas disponibles en tu región</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% de descuento</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/D</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">Sin datos en vivo - mostrando precios guardados</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs y expansiones (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Desc. histórico: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Calificación</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorito</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Descuento histórico: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) disponibles</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_available_on"> Disponible en %1$s</string> <string name="game_free_to_play_label">Free to Play</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">GRATIS</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">¡GRATIS!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Gratis para jugar</string> <string name="price_was">Antes: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">¡GRATIS AHORA!</string> <string name="price_until">Hasta: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Mínimo histórico</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">¡Mínimo histórico!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Alerta de descuento</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s está en su menor precio: -%2$d%% en %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s tiene %2$d%% de descuento en %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">Para aplicar los cambios es necesario reiniciar la app. ¿Confirma que quiere reiniciar?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Aplicar cambios</string> <string name="action_no_apply">No aplicar</string>
<string name="offline_banner">Estás sin conexión. Los precios pueden estar desactualizados.</string> <string name="prices_from_cache">⚠ Precios cargados desde caché (pueden estar desactualizados)</string> <string name="label_coming_soon">próximamente</string> <string name="dolar_tarjeta_rate"> Precio estimado con tarjeta argentina (cotización: $%1$s)</string> <string name="ars_price_disclaimer">Incluye IVA y percepciones. El precio final puede variar según tu tarjeta.</string> <string name="favorites_empty">No tenés favoritos aún. ¡Explorá juegos y agregalos a tu lista!</string> <string name="favorites_header">Tus Juegos</string>
<!-- Precios regionales --> <string name="prices_argentina_header">Precios en Argentina</string> <string name="prices_argentina_subtitle">Precios reales obtenidos de cada tienda para Argentina</string> <string name="steam_ar_regional_label">Precio regional (fijado por el publisher para Argentina)</string> <string name="steam_ar_tax_note"> Este es el precio base. Con impuestos de tarjeta (IVA + Ganancias) el costo final puede ser mayor.</string> <string name="steam_us_reference_label">Precio en EE.UU. (solo de referencia)</string> <string name="international_prices_header">Otras tiendas (precios internacionales)</string> <string name="international_prices_disclaimer">Estos son precios de EE.UU./globales en USD. El precio real en tu región puede ser diferente.</string>
<!-- Toggle de moneda y precios de referencia --> <string name="currency_display_label">Moneda de visualización</string> <string name="game_prices_header">Precios</string> <string name="game_prices_subtitle">Precios en vivo de tiendas y referencia del catálogo</string> <string name="game_reference_prices">Precios en otras tiendas</string> <string name="game_reference_prices_note">Precios de referencia del catálogo (USD). Los precios reales pueden variar.</string> <string name="game_price_ars_approx">≈ %1$s</string> <string name="price_regional_label">Precio regional (Argentina)</string> <string name="price_currency_label">Precio en %1$s</string> <string name="price_ref_label">(ref.)</string>
<!-- Botones de redirección a tienda --> <string name="btn_buy_now">Comprar en la tienda</string> <string name="btn_get_free">Obtener gratis</string> <string name="btn_play_free">Jugar gratis</string>
</resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">ArgenGamer</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Offers</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Explore</string> <string name="nav_news">News</string> <string name="nav_settings">Settings</string> <string name="nav_favorites">Favorites</string>
<string name="action_search">Search</string> <string name="action_save">Save</string> <string name="action_edit">Edit</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="action_remove">Remove</string> <string name="label_back">Back</string>
<string name="label_all">All</string> <string name="label_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="label_profile">Profile</string> <string name="label_username">Username</string> <string name="label_email">Email</string> <string name="label_not_set">Not set</string> <string name="label_region">Region</string> <string name="label_country_affects_prices">Country (affects prices)</string> <string name="label_language">Language</string> <string name="language_english">English - EN</string> <string name="language_spanish">Español - ES</string> <string name="label_notifications">Notifications</string> <string name="label_enable_notifications">Enable Notifications</string> <string name="label_alerts_unread">Alerts (%1$d unread)</string> <string name="label_favorites_count">Favorites (%1$d)</string> <string name="label_no_favorites">No favorites yet. Add games from the catalog!</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Notification prefs</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notifications: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Offers</string> <string name="label_news">News</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Historical Low</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Search games or tags...</string> <string name="games_no_results">No games found</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">All Categories</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Updates</string> <string name="news_category_events">Events</string> <string name="news_no_results">No news found</string> <string name="news_category_format">Category: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Hist. Low</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Temp. Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">All Free</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">None of the games in your catalog have active discounts right now. Check back later!</string>
<string name="offers_tab_price_drops">Price Drops</string> <string name="offers_no_price_drops">No permanent price drops detected yet. We track base price changes over time.</string> <string name="badge_price_drop"> Price Drop</string> <string name="price_new_base">New price: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="offer_ended">Offer ended</string> <string name="offer_countdown_hours">%1$dh %2$dm remaining</string> <string name="offer_countdown_date">Until %1$s</string> <string name="offer_on_sale">On sale now</string>
<string name="game_available_on_header">Available on</string> <string name="game_release_date">Release Date</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Metacritic Rating</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string> <string name="game_rating_source">Metacritic</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Historical Discount</string> <string name="game_description">Description</string> <string name="game_prices">Prices</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Stores available in your region</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% off</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">FREE</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/A</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">No live data available - showing cached prices</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs & Expansions (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Hist. discount: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Rating</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorite</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Historical discount: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) available</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_available_on"> Available on %1$s</string> <string name="game_free_to_play_label">Free to Play</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">FREE</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">FREE!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Free to Play</string> <string name="price_was">Was: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">FREE NOW</string> <string name="price_until">Until: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Historical Low</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">Historical Low!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Discount Alert</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s is at its lowest price ever: -%2$d%% on %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s is %2$d%% off on %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">To apply changes, the app must restart. Do you want to restart now?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Apply changes</string> <string name="action_no_apply">Do not apply</string>
<string name="offline_banner">You are offline. Prices may be outdated.</string> <string name="prices_from_cache">⚠ Prices loaded from cache (may be outdated)</string> <string name="label_coming_soon">coming soon</string> <string name="dolar_tarjeta_rate"> Estimated price with Argentine card (rate: $%1$s)</string> <string name="ars_price_disclaimer">Includes IVA and tax withholdings. Actual price may vary by card.</string> <string name="favorites_empty">No favorites yet. Explore games and add them to your list!</string> <string name="favorites_header">Your Games</string>
<!-- Regional pricing --> <string name="prices_argentina_header">Prices in Argentina</string> <string name="prices_argentina_subtitle">Real prices fetched directly from each store for Argentina</string> <string name="steam_ar_regional_label">Regional price (publisher-set for Argentina)</string> <string name="steam_ar_tax_note"> This is the base price. With card taxes (IVA + Ganancias) the final cost may be higher.</string> <string name="steam_us_reference_label">US price (reference only)</string> <string name="international_prices_header">Other Stores (international prices)</string> <string name="international_prices_disclaimer">These are US/global prices in USD. The actual price in your region may differ.</string>
<!-- Currency toggle & reference prices --> <string name="currency_display_label">Display currency</string> <string name="game_prices_header">Prices</string> <string name="game_prices_subtitle">Live prices from stores and catalog reference</string> <string name="game_reference_prices">Other Store Prices</string> <string name="game_reference_prices_note">Reference prices from catalog (USD). Actual store prices may differ.</string> <string name="game_price_ars_approx">≈ %1$s</string> <string name="price_regional_label">Regional price (Argentina)</string> <string name="price_currency_label">Price in %1$s</string> <string name="price_ref_label">(ref.)</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">ArgenGamer</string>
<string name="nav_offers">Offers</string> <string name="nav_catalog">Explore</string> <string name="nav_news">News</string> <string name="nav_settings">Settings</string> <string name="nav_favorites">Favorites</string>
<string name="action_search">Search</string> <string name="action_save">Save</string> <string name="action_edit">Edit</string> <string name="action_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="action_remove">Remove</string> <string name="label_back">Back</string>
<string name="label_all">All</string> <string name="label_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="label_profile">Profile</string> <string name="label_username">Username</string> <string name="label_email">Email</string> <string name="label_not_set">Not set</string> <string name="label_region">Region</string> <string name="label_country_affects_prices">Country (affects prices)</string> <string name="label_language">Language</string> <string name="language_english">English - EN</string> <string name="language_spanish">Español - ES</string> <string name="label_notifications">Notifications</string> <string name="label_enable_notifications">Enable Notifications</string> <string name="label_alerts_unread">Alerts (%1$d unread)</string> <string name="label_favorites_count">Favorites (%1$d)</string> <string name="label_no_favorites">No favorites yet. Add games from the catalog!</string> <string name="label_notification_prefs">Notification prefs</string> <string name="label_notifications_for_game">Notifications: %1$s</string> <string name="label_offers">Offers</string> <string name="label_news">News</string> <string name="label_historical_low">Historical Low</string>
<string name="games_search_placeholder">Search games or tags...</string> <string name="games_no_results">No games found</string>
<string name="news_filter_all_categories">All Categories</string> <string name="news_category_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="news_category_updates">Updates</string> <string name="news_category_events">Events</string> <string name="news_no_results">No news found</string> <string name="news_category_format">Category: %1$s</string>
<string name="offers_tab_discounts">Discounts</string> <string name="offers_tab_favorites">Favorites</string> <string name="offers_tab_hist_low">Hist. Low</string> <string name="offers_tab_free">Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_temp_free">Temp. Free</string> <string name="offers_filter_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="offers_filter_all_free">All Free</string> <string name="offers_no_discounts">None of the games in your catalog have active discounts right now. Check back later!</string>
<string name="offers_tab_price_drops">Price Drops</string> <string name="offers_no_price_drops">No permanent price drops detected yet. We track base price changes over time.</string> <string name="badge_price_drop"> Price Drop</string> <string name="price_new_base">New price: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="offer_ended">Offer ended</string> <string name="offer_countdown_hours">%1$dh %2$dm remaining</string> <string name="offer_countdown_date">Until %1$s</string> <string name="offer_on_sale">On sale now</string>
<string name="game_available_on_header">Available on</string> <string name="game_release_date">Release Date</string> <string name="game_rating_label">Metacritic Rating</string> <string name="game_rating_format">%1$.1f / 10</string> <string name="game_rating_star">★ %1$.1f</string> <string name="game_rating_source">Metacritic</string> <string name="game_historical_discount">Historical Discount</string> <string name="game_description">Description</string> <string name="game_prices">Prices</string> <string name="game_prices_region">%1$s %2$s - Stores available in your region</string> <string name="game_off_percent">%1$d%% off</string> <string name="game_price_usd">US$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_price_usd_simple">$%1$.2f</string> <string name="game_free">FREE</string> <string name="game_not_available">N/A</string> <string name="game_no_live_data">No live data available - showing cached prices</string> <string name="game_dlcs_expansions">DLCs & Expansions (%1$d)</string> <string name="game_dlc_hist_discount">Hist. discount: %1$d%%</string>
<string name="content_desc_rating">Rating</string> <string name="content_desc_favorite">Favorite</string> <string name="game_historical_discount_short">Historical discount: %1$d%%</string> <string name="game_dlcs_available">%1$d DLC(s) available</string> <string name="game_price_platform">%1$s: $%2$.2f</string> <string name="game_available_on"> Available on %1$s</string> <string name="game_free_to_play_label">Free to Play</string>
<string name="badge_f2p">F2P</string> <string name="badge_free">FREE</string> <string name="badge_free_exclaim">FREE!</string> <string name="discount_badge_percent">-%1$d%%</string> <string name="price_free_to_play">Free to Play</string> <string name="price_was">Was: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="price_free_now">FREE NOW</string> <string name="price_until">Until: %1$s</string> <string name="historical_low_label">★ Historical Low</string>
<string name="notif_title_historical_low">Historical Low!</string> <string name="notif_title_discount">Discount Alert</string> <string name="notif_message_historical_low">%1$s is at its lowest price ever: -%2$d%% on %3$s!</string> <string name="notif_message_discount">%1$s is %2$d%% off on %3$s!</string>
<string name="language_restart_message">To apply changes, the app must restart. Do you want to restart now?</string> <string name="action_apply_changes">Apply changes</string> <string name="action_no_apply">Do not apply</string>
<string name="offline_banner">You are offline. Prices may be outdated.</string> <string name="prices_from_cache">⚠ Prices loaded from cache (may be outdated)</string> <string name="label_coming_soon">coming soon</string> <string name="dolar_tarjeta_rate"> Estimated price with Argentine card (rate: $%1$s)</string> <string name="ars_price_disclaimer">Includes IVA and tax withholdings. Actual price may vary by card.</string> <string name="favorites_empty">No favorites yet. Explore games and add them to your list!</string> <string name="favorites_header">Your Games</string>
<!-- Regional pricing --> <string name="prices_argentina_header">Prices in Argentina</string> <string name="prices_argentina_subtitle">Real prices fetched directly from each store for Argentina</string> <string name="steam_ar_regional_label">Regional price (publisher-set for Argentina)</string> <string name="steam_ar_tax_note"> This is the base price. With card taxes (IVA + Ganancias) the final cost may be higher.</string> <string name="steam_us_reference_label">US price (reference only)</string> <string name="international_prices_header">Other Stores (international prices)</string> <string name="international_prices_disclaimer">These are US/global prices in USD. The actual price in your region may differ.</string>
<!-- Currency toggle & reference prices --> <string name="currency_display_label">Display currency</string> <string name="game_prices_header">Prices</string> <string name="game_prices_subtitle">Live prices from stores and catalog reference</string> <string name="game_reference_prices">Other Store Prices</string> <string name="game_reference_prices_note">Reference prices from catalog (USD). Actual store prices may differ.</string> <string name="game_price_ars_approx">≈ %1$s</string> <string name="price_regional_label">Regional price (Argentina)</string> <string name="price_currency_label">Price in %1$s</string> <string name="price_ref_label">(ref.)</string>
<!-- Store redirect buttons --> <string name="btn_buy_now">Buy on Store</string> <string name="btn_get_free">Get for Free</string> <string name="btn_play_free">Play for Free</string>
</resources>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
Game Deals Tracker

Arquitectura Clean Architecture · MVVM · Android / Kotlin

Capa de
Presentación (UI)

Screens

  • MainScreen
  • GamesScreen
  • GameDetailScreen
  • OffersScreen
  • NewsScreen / Detail
  • FavoritesScreen
  • SettingsScreen

Componentes

  • GameCard
  • DiscountCard
  • NewsCard
  • SharedComponents

Jetpack Compose

Navigation Compose

➜

Capa de Presentación
Lógica

ViewModels

  • GamesViewModel
  • OffersViewModel
  • NewsViewModel
  • SettingsViewModel

Responsabilidades

  • Estado UI (StateFlow)
  • Lógica de filtrado
  • Búsqueda
  • Toggle USD/ARS
  • Gestión de favoritos
  • Conectividad
➜

Capa de
Dominio

Use Cases

  • GameUseCase
  • DiscountUseCase
  • NewsUseCase
  • SettingsUseCase

Modelos

  • Game / DLC
  • Discount
  • News
  • UserSettings
  • CountryInfo
  • StorePrice

Interfaces Repository

  • GameRepository
  • DiscountRepository
  • NewsRepository
  • UserSettingsRepository
➜

Capa de
Datos

️ Room Database

  • GameTrackerDatabase
  • GamePriceEntity / Dao
  • GameImageEntity / Dao
  • FavoriteGameEntity / Dao
  • PriceHistoryEntity / Dao

⚙️ DataStore

  • SettingsDataStore
  • Idioma y preferencias

API Services

  • SteamPriceService
  • EpicPriceService
  • GogPriceService
  • XboxPriceService
  • EAPriceService
  • UbisoftPriceService
  • BattleNetPriceService
  • DolarService

Otros

  • PriceRefreshManager
  • ArgentineTaxCalculator
  • ConnectivityObserver
  • GameCatalog
  • Repositories Impl
➜

Servicios
Externos

APIs de Tiendas

  • Steam Store API
  • Epic Games Store
  • GOG.com
  • Xbox/Microsoft
  • EA App
  • Ubisoft Connect
  • Battle.net

APIs de Datos

  • DolarAPI (dólar tarjeta)

Imágenes

  • Steam CDN
  • PlayStation CDN

Manejo de Estado y Flujos

StateFlow / MutableStateFlow · Manejo reactivo de estados entre capas. Coroutines para operaciones asíncronas (viewModelScope).
ConnectivityObserver monitorea la red en tiempo real. PriceRefreshManager emite actualizaciones progresivas por lotes.

Inyección de Dependencias

ServiceLocator (Manual DI) · Inicializa y provee todas las dependencias: Database, DAOs, DataStore, Repositories, UseCases, API Services, ConnectivityObserver.

Tecnologías Utilizadas

Kotlin

Lenguaje principal de desarrollo.

Jetpack Compose

Construcción de la UI de forma declarativa.

Navigation Compose

Navegación entre pantallas y pestañas.

️

Room

Base de datos local SQLite. Cache de precios, imágenes, favoritos e historial.

DataStore

Almacenamiento de preferencias (idioma, país, notificaciones).

HttpURLConnection

Cliente HTTP nativo para consumo de APIs REST de tiendas.

Material 3

Sistema de diseño para la interfaz. Tema oscuro.

️

Coil

Carga asíncrona de imágenes desde URLs (Steam/PS CDN).

AndroidX

Librerías modernas de Jetpack (ViewModel, Lifecycle, etc.).

KSP

Procesador de símbolos de Kotlin para generación de código Room.

JUnit + Mockito

Testing unitario con ~200 tests. Turbine para Flows. JaCoCo 94%.

️

Gradle KTS

Automatización de builds, dependencias y tareas (JaCoCo).

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Game Deals Tracker — Diagrama de Arquitectura

CLEAN ARCHITECTURE  ·  MVVM  ·  ANDROID  /  KOTLIN

Capa de
Presentación (UI)

Screens

  • MainScreen
  • GamesScreen
  • GameDetailScreen
  • OffersScreen
  • NewsScreen
  • NewsDetailScreen
  • FavoritesScreen
  • SettingsScreen

Componentes

  • GameCard
  • DiscountCard
  • NewsCard
  • SharedComponents
  • Constants

✦ Jetpack Compose

✦ Navigation Compose

Capa de Presentación
Lógica

ViewModels

  • GamesViewModel
  • OffersViewModel
  • NewsViewModel
  • SettingsViewModel

Responsabilidades

  • Estado UI (StateFlow)
  • Filtrado y búsqueda
  • Toggle USD / ARS
  • Gestión de favoritos
  • Monitoreo de red
  • Carga progresiva

Capa de
Dominio

Use Cases

  • GameUseCase
  • DiscountUseCase
  • NewsUseCase
  • SettingsUseCase

Modelos

  • Game / DLC
  • Discount
  • News
  • UserSettings
  • CountryInfo
  • StorePrice

Repository Interfaces

  • GameRepository
  • DiscountRepository
  • NewsRepository
  • UserSettingsRepository

Capa de
Datos

️ Room Database

  • GameTrackerDatabase
  • GamePriceEntity / DAO
  • GameImageEntity / DAO
  • FavoriteGameEntity / DAO
  • PriceHistoryEntity / DAO

DataStore

  • SettingsDataStore
  • Idioma y preferencias

API Services

  • SteamPriceService
  • EpicPriceService
  • GogPriceService
  • XboxPriceService
  • EAPriceService
  • UbisoftPriceService
  • BattleNetPriceService
  • DolarService

Utilidades

  • PriceRefreshManager
  • ArgentineTaxCalculator
  • ConnectivityObserver
  • GameCatalog
  • Repository Impls ×4

Servicios
Externos

APIs de Tiendas

  • Steam Store API
  • Epic Games Store
  • GOG.com
  • Xbox / Microsoft
  • EA App
  • Ubisoft Connect
  • Battle.net

APIs de Datos

  • DolarAPI (dólar tarjeta)

CDN de Imágenes

  • Steam CDN
  • PlayStation CDN

Manejo de Estado y Flujos

StateFlow / MutableStateFlow — Manejo reactivo de estados UI.
Coroutines con viewModelScope para operaciones asíncronas.
ConnectivityObserver monitorea la red. PriceRefreshManager emite actualizaciones progresivas por lotes de 5 juegos.

Inyección de Dependencias

ServiceLocator (Manual DI)
Inicializa y provee: Database, DAOs, DataStore, Repositories, UseCases, API Services y ConnectivityObserver.
Inicializado en GameTrackerApp (Application).

Testing

~200 tests unitarios con JUnit + Mockito-Kotlin.
Turbine para testing de Flows. JaCoCo: 94% cobertura de instrucciones.
Cubre modelos, use cases, ViewModels, repos y servicios.

Tecnologías Utilizadas

Kotlin

Lenguaje principal de desarrollo. Coroutines para asincronismo.

Jetpack Compose

UI declarativa moderna. Composables reutilizables.

Navigation Compose

Navegación entre pantallas y pestañas con tipado.

️

Room

Base de datos SQLite local. Cache de precios, imágenes, favoritos e historial.

DataStore

Preferencias persistentes: idioma, país, notificaciones.

HttpURLConnection

Cliente HTTP nativo de Java para consumo de APIs REST.

Material 3

Sistema de diseño. Tema oscuro con paleta personalizada.

️

Coil

Carga asíncrona de imágenes con AsyncImage desde CDN.

AndroidX

ViewModel, Lifecycle, Activity Compose, Core KTX.

KSP

Kotlin Symbol Processing para generación de código Room.

JUnit + Mockito

Tests unitarios, mocks, coroutines-test y Turbine para Flows.

️

Gradle Kotlin DSL

Build system. JaCoCo, version catalog (libs.versions.toml).

Game Deals Tracker · Clean Architecture · 2024-2026

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Game Deals Tracker — Diagrama de Arquitectura

CLEAN ARCHITECTURE  ·  MVVM  ·  ANDROID / KOTLIN

Capa de
Presentación (UI)

Screens

  • MainScreen
  • GamesScreen
  • GameDetailScreen
  • OffersScreen
  • NewsScreen / Detail
  • FavoritesScreen
  • SettingsScreen

Componentes

  • GameCard
  • DiscountCard
  • NewsCard
  • SharedComponents
  • Constants

✦ Jetpack Compose

✦ Navigation Compose

Capa de
Presentación Lógica

ViewModels

  • GamesViewModel
  • OffersViewModel
  • NewsViewModel
  • SettingsViewModel

Responsabilidades

  • Estado UI (StateFlow)
  • Filtrado y búsqueda
  • Toggle USD / ARS
  • Gestión de favoritos
  • Monitoreo de red
  • Carga progresiva

Capa de
Dominio

Use Cases

  • GameUseCase
  • DiscountUseCase
  • NewsUseCase
  • SettingsUseCase

Modelos

  • Game / DLC
  • Discount / News
  • UserSettings
  • CountryInfo
  • StorePrice

Repository Interfaces

  • GameRepository
  • DiscountRepository
  • NewsRepository
  • UserSettingsRepository

Capa de
Datos

️ Room Database

  • GameTrackerDatabase
  • GamePriceEntity / DAO
  • GameImageEntity / DAO
  • FavoriteGameEntity / DAO
  • PriceHistoryEntity / DAO

DataStore

  • SettingsDataStore (idioma, prefs)

API Services

  • Steam · Epic · GOG · Xbox
  • EA · Ubisoft · Battle.net
  • DolarService

Utilidades

  • PriceRefreshManager
  • ArgentineTaxCalculator
  • ConnectivityObserver
  • GameCatalog · Repos Impl ×4

Servicios
Externos

APIs de Tiendas

  • Steam Store API
  • Epic Games Store
  • GOG.com
  • Xbox / Microsoft
  • EA App
  • Ubisoft Connect
  • Battle.net

APIs de Datos

  • DolarAPI (dólar tarjeta)

CDN Imágenes

  • Steam CDN
  • PlayStation CDN

Manejo de Estado y Flujos

StateFlow / MutableStateFlow — Manejo reactivo de estados UI. Coroutines con viewModelScope. ConnectivityObserver monitorea la red. PriceRefreshManager emite actualizaciones progresivas por lotes.

Inyección de Dependencias

ServiceLocator (Manual DI) — Inicializa y provee: Database, DAOs, DataStore, Repositories, UseCases, API Services y ConnectivityObserver. Inicializado en GameTrackerApp.

Testing

~200 tests unitarios · JUnit + Mockito-Kotlin. Turbine para Flows. JaCoCo: 94% cobertura. Cubre modelos, use cases, ViewModels, repos y servicios.

Tecnologías Utilizadas

Kotlin

Lenguaje principal. Coroutines para asincronismo.

Jetpack Compose

UI declarativa. Composables reutilizables.

Navigation Compose

Navegación entre pantallas y pestañas.

️

Room

DB SQLite local. Cache de precios, imágenes, favoritos e historial.

DataStore

Preferencias persistentes: idioma, país, notificaciones.

HttpURLConnection

Cliente HTTP nativo para consumo de APIs REST.

Material 3

Sistema de diseño. Tema oscuro personalizado.

️

Coil

Carga asíncrona de imágenes (AsyncImage).

AndroidX

ViewModel, Lifecycle, Activity Compose, KTX.

KSP

Kotlin Symbol Processing para Room.

JUnit + Mockito

Tests unitarios, mocks, coroutines-test, Turbine.

️

Gradle Kotlin DSL

Build system. JaCoCo, version catalog.

Game Deals Tracker · Clean Architecture · 2024–2026
